case_title: BAUMANN ANDREW DBA A B TRUCKING VS JIM PAYNE DBA PAC MANN TOWING et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,800.00 FILED BY BAUMANN ANDREW DBA  A B TRUCKING AS TO DEFENDANT JIM PAYNE DBA PAC MANN TOWING CONNORS ART DBA PACIFIC MOTOR TRUCKING CHAUDHRI PREM P DBA SANTA FE PACIFIC REALTY CORP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-27-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CONNORS ART DBA PACIFIC MOTOR TRUCKING
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CHAUDHRI PREM P DBA SANTA FE PACIFIC REALTY CORP
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT JIM PAYNE DBA PAC MANN TOWING

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BAUMANN ANDREW DBA  A B TRUCKING IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT JIM PAYNE DBA PAC MANN TOWING CONNORS ART DBA PACIFIC MOTOR TRUCKING CHAUDHRI PREM P DBA SANTA FE PACIFIC REALTY CORP STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF JUDGMENT TO PACIF. MOTOR TRUCKING RETURNED, UNABLE TO FORWARD.
